title: Resolve source-routing rule: SRD1: rho / M_enc to A-sector
description: Route: rho / M_enc -> A-sector mass charge. Allowed condition: ordinary mass density sources the reduced A-flux reference charge. Forbidden condition: rho is also routed into kappa, zeta, curvature, H, exchange, or dark mass channels by convenience. Consequence: A-sector remains the only currently licensed ordinary exterior mass coin..
